title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF KALUMBO YAN AND VILLAREAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAWAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL NEGROS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2122 / 51 OG No. 7, 3384 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1303, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF KALUMBO YAN AND VILLAREAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAWAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL NEGROS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Kalumboyan in the barrio of Nangka, and the sitio of Balabag in the barrio of Manihihon, Municipality of Bayawan, Province of Oriental Negros, are hereby constituted into separate and independent barrios to be known as the barrios of Kalumboyan and Villareal, respectively.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
